items.creator: @GamerHashCom
items.title:
RT by @TEIKEEN1: GamerHash & http://Io.net - Creating The Decentralized Future Of AI 🔥

GamerHash is excited to officially announce our partnership with @ionet, another innovator in the sphere of decentralized computing networks - #DePIN.

Our partnership is set to make significant waves in the gaming and #AI industries, bridging GamerHash's substantial 780,000-strong Gamer Community with the cutting-edge technology of http://Io.net on @solana.

By aligning with http://Io.net, we're turning the massive computing power of gaming into a resource for innovation and growth in the AI space 🤝

Read more about it on our Medium:
👉 https://gamerhash.com/en/l/nzRen

#GamerHashAI #ionet  #SOL
